label: Per|Form — Analytics & KPI Platform
description: Performance tracking, KPI analytics, and business intelligence. Houses OKAI (Open|Klass AI), scout-hub, film-room, and war-room. Deployed via AIMS VPS Docker profile --profile perform.

chatIcon.rule: ACHEEVY Helmet is the ONLY primary chat avatar. Per|Form surfaces use ACHEEVY as narrator, with analytics-specific UI badges for scout-hub/film-room/war-room.

context.gridiron: Per|Form originated from Gridiron sports analytics. scout-hub scouts talent, film-room reviews footage, war-room handles strategy.
context.okai: OKAI (Open|Klass AI) is the open education/classification AI engine hosted within Per|Form.
context.lucDependency: Per|Form calls LUC for financial metrics, billing calculations, and quota enforcement.
